results.title: 显性原则提取
results.raw_content: {"schema_version":"1.1","function_type":"experience_extract","result":{"candidates":[{"candidate_content":"如果你想做出人们想要的东西，在花几个月在脑海中构建之前，先和用户谈谈。","creator_name":"Paul Graham","creator_attribution_type":"speaker","source_derivation_type":"cleaned_quote","source_excerpt":"If you want to make something people want, talk to users before you spend months building in your head.","source_location":"Paul Graham素材","preserve_original_score":0.95,"extraction_confidence":0.95,"attitude_type":"practical","risk_notes":[]}],"discarded_examples":[]},"confidence":0.9,"warnings":[]}

candidates.candidate_content: 如果你想做出人们想要的东西，在花几个月在脑海中构建之前，先和用户谈谈。
candidates.source_excerpt: If you want to make something people want, talk to users before you spend months building in your head.
